author: y4rr
content: Closing: Phase 1 scaffold was CPU-side observer nonsense, not the GPU paging infrastructure ferrotorch-paged actually needs. The crate is being deleted. A real Phase 1 will start over once the Llama 3 8B GPU inference stack is landed (issues #505-#515), profiling on-device activations with CUDA reduction kernels and the ferrotorch-gpu memory primitives.
